name: Bill One
description: Sansans cloud invoice-receipt SaaS — digitize Japanese paper invoices with OCR API, e-invoice support.

seo.title: Bill One — Invoicing / Taxes / Sales Tax
seo.meta_description: Bill One: Sansans cloud invoice-receipt SaaS — digitize Japanese paper invoices with OCR API, e-invoice support.

when_to_use: Digitizing paper invoices for Japanese enterprises via OCR API
Japan e-invoice (JP PINT) compliance for accounting software vendors
Automating invoice receipt workflow for Sansan CRM-integrated teams
Centralizing invoice processing across subsidiaries in Japan

pros: OCR tuned specifically for Japanese paper invoices
Compliant with Japan Qualified Invoice (inv reg) system
Clean REST API for receipt ingestion
Integrates with major JP accounting suites
cons: Japan-only — no value outside JP workflows
Docs primarily in Japanese, limited English
Pricing skewed to mid-market, not tiny teams
Locked into Sansan ecosystem for best features
review.verdict: Best-in-class tool for digitizing Japanese invoices, but only useful if you operate inside Japan.
review.best_for: Japanese companies digitizing paper invoices and meeting Qualified Invoice compliance.
review.not_for: Teams outside Japan or anyone needing a generic global e-invoicing API.
